sourceMovie.title: Retribution
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Audiences latched onto Retribution (2023) as a thriller theatrical experience: big enough for a group watch, specific enough to reward a second viewing once you know where it's headed. The thriller and action blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: Hanna
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Retribution's thriller stayed with you, Hanna (2011) delivers the same sensation through an entirely different story. The action through-line is the real common thread between them.

recommendations.title: American Assassin
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: Where Retribution excels in thriller, American Assassin (2017) doubles down on action to comparable effect. The tonal similarities run deep enough that watching both back-to-back feels intentional.

recommendations.title: Weekend in Taipei
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: Weekend in Taipei (2024) is the natural next step after Retribution: same thriller DNA, different perspective. The tense streak and action elevate it well above a simple genre exercise.

recommendations.title: The Bourne Supremacy
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: Fans of Retribution who respond to its thriller will find The Bourne Supremacy (2004) immediately familiar. Both films share a action sensibility without ever feeling like carbon copies of each other.

recommendations.title: John Wick: Chapter 4
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: There's a reason Retribution fans keep landing on John Wick: Chapter 4 (2023) — the thriller is unmistakably related even when the plots diverge. Both films operate on the same emotional frequency, especially in their third acts.

recommendations.title: Death Race
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: Death Race draws from the same thriller well as Retribution, channeling action in ways that feel unmistakably related. The 2008 film makes a natural companion watch — similar in spirit but distinctly its own.

recommendations.title: Hitman's Wife's Bodyguard
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: Hitman's Wife's Bodyguard (2021) captures the thriller appeal of Retribution without simply imitating it. The action streak running through both films is what puts Hitman's Wife's Bodyguard at the top of any "if you liked…" shortlist.

recommendations.title: The International
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: The thriller appeal of Retribution — that dark edge, the action — translates cleanly into The International (2009). Different setting, same essential satisfaction.

recommendations.title: Jolt
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: The filmmakers behind Jolt (2021) clearly understood what makes thriller work — the same quality that keeps Retribution rewatchable. Expect the same dark rhythm, executed with a fresh angle.

recommendations.title: Gunpowder Milkshake
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: Gunpowder Milkshake (2021) is the kind of film Retribution fans discover and immediately send to their group chat. The thriller overlap is real, but it's the dark emotional pull that seals the recommendation.

faq.question: What should I watch after Retribution?
faq.answer: Try Hanna, American Assassin, Weekend in Taipei—each shares DNA with Retribution while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Retribution?
faq.answer: Retribution (2023) is best described as Thriller, Action, Adventure. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Retribution worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 6.5/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this thriller lane.
